rows.source_ref: scherzi et al., "Recommended Strategies on Forex Factory - Real Traders", Forex Factory forum thread #972324, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/972324-recommended-strategies-on-forex-factory-real-traders
rows.strategy_name: FF meta-discussion: which threads are actually useful
rows.concept: Meta thread asking real traders which FF threads carry real edge; contains no self-contained rule set of its own.
rows.eligibility_reason: No implementable rules in this document; only a request for recommendations, a vague trend aphorism, and pointers to external threads.
rows.notes: Two threads are name-dropped as useful but their rules are NOT in this PDF: a TMA (Triangular Moving Average) strategy thread t=874421 (scherzi calls it 'a lot of ideas / interesting study field', says he does not follow it), and t=345838 (Empiric1 uses 'modified versions of a couple of the methods'). tiborf71's only rule-like statement is 'trade always in the direction of the trend and let the position run' -- too vague to mechanize. If harvesting the TMA edge is desired, source thread 874421 directly rather than this pointer thread.

notes: Forum meta-thread; zero self-contained strategy candidates -> one REJECTED summary row.
External threads referenced for potential follow-up: FF t=874421 (TMA strategy), FF t=345838.
